---
title: "SelectionPanel.tsx"
path: "C:/Users/Craig/Corvus/CorvusStar/src/tools/pennyone/vis/components/SelectionPanel.tsx"
loc: 47
complexity: 1
logic_score: 8.82
style_score: 3.81
intel_score: 2.00
overall_score: 4.85
---

## Intent
React component rendering SelectionPanel.

## Interaction Protocol
Include <SelectionPanel /> within a React-Three-Fiber Canvas context.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 8.8/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.8/10
- **Intel [I]**: 2.0/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 7 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [*](file://react)
- [Html](file://@react-three/drei)
- [Node](file://../types/index.ts)

### Exports
- `SelectionPanel`
- `SelectionPanel`
